title: Did Tabris have a core
wikitext:
[]: Did Tabris have a core?             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Jan 23, 2009 6:21 pm Since Kaworu was an angel did he have a core. In this series(and the ending of RoE) a core was not visible. Although this may be obvious, since Tabris was a humanoid angel is it possible his/her/it's core is the heart?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Jan 23, 2009 6:55 pm some stuff here: http://www.evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=3734

[]: Re: Did Tabris have a core?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jan 24, 2009 8:12 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: In this series a core was not visible.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Sat Jan 24, 2009 8:20 am Wouldn't Shinji have noticed if Kaworu had a core in the middle of his chest? Or if Kaworu had a vagoo? Shinji: What's that? Kaworu: When I was young I had an unfortunate accident in which a red beach ball was permanently lodged in my gut. Shinji: No dude I meant your vagina...

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Sat Jan 24, 2009 11:10 am master_lloyd wrote: Shinji: What's that? Kaworu: When I was young I had an unfortunate accident in which a red beach ball was permanently lodged in my gut. Shinji: No dude I meant your vagina...

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Jan 24, 2009 12:37 pm For the record, Kaworu did have an Eva-01 style core configuration in his early development stages (As a "catboy"), but that appears to have been dumped. Regardless of what Kaworu's private parts may have looked like, Shinji would have noticed immediately if Kaworu had a core, and so would everyone else. Apart from being made of the same matter as Adam, Kaworu's body is essentially Lilin. (Note that Kaworu's counterpart Rei has no core either)

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Sat Jan 24, 2009 1:59 pm But does the original lilith have a core? Adam seems to have one, but I don't remember having seen lilith with a core.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Jan 24, 2009 2:50 pm Whether Lilith has one or not is pretty much unknown. She may, she may not; arguments can be made for both sides.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 24, 2009 5:43 pm master_lloyd wrote: Wouldn't Shinji have noticed if Kaworu had a core in the middle of his chest? Or if Kaworu had a vagoo?

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Sun Jan 25, 2009 5:06 am Reichu wrote: Shinji couldn't have noticed if Kaworu had a vagoo, because Kaworu's legs were together during the whole scene.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sun Jan 25, 2009 5:10 am master_lloyd wrote: You just won't let that theory die will you?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jan 25, 2009 1:27 pm master_lloyd wrote: You just won't let that theory die will you?

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Sun Jan 25, 2009 2:42 pm Reichu wrote: You cannot visually detect the presence of a vagina if someone is sitting down next to you or if they are standing up straight with legs together.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jan 25, 2009 3:11 pm Oh, must you propagate that myth of the vulgar masses, that the vulva and the vagina are somehow the same thing? It's a popular failure akin to calling someone's face their "mouth". The lunacy! Now, then: The most Shinji would have been able to see if Kaworu were a girl, with "normal girl parts", would be the front of the labial cleft and maybe some clitoris poking out. But in order for a vagina to be properly detected, Kaworu would have to splay those legs apart like a giraffe going for water. Or a lady getting her check-up. Hopefully this concludes any tangents and regrettable misunderstandings.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Sun Jan 25, 2009 3:36 pm Surely 'proper detection' wouldn't be necessary a simple check of "Cock or no cock" would suffice? Male genitalia are quite visible ya know... But I see you were being pedantic stating the biological qualifications needed for lady parts. Unless you think Kaworu's all smooth down there like an action man doll. Anyway, I think Kaworu's probably a dude. And I can't be bothered arguing about it anymore. Also: Reichu wrote: Oh, must you propagate that myth of the vulgar masses, that the vulva and the vagina are somehow the same thing?

[]:             Quote Post by VoidEater » Mon Jan 26, 2009 12:51 pm master_lloyd wrote: Surely 'proper detection' wouldn't be necessary a simple check of "Cock or no cock" would suffice?

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Mon Jan 26, 2009 1:56 pm There is a difference between a Core and an S2 Organ. They say that the S2O is located within the core and thus they can live on forever but it could be within the body of the being - Kaworu, lilith - Both can live on forever but they could have they're core's within they're bodies...I mean Lilith has a big body, it could be in there somewhere and Kaworu..Well I don't know. ;;

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jan 27, 2009 9:46 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: There is a difference between a Core and an S2 Organ.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Jan 27, 2009 9:50 pm Reichu wrote: V may be a hermaphrodite.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Tue Jan 27, 2009 10:47 pm I think Shinji would be the type to look nowhere near Kaworu's crotch. Good manners, y'know. Not to mention how awkward and scary it's be to look at someone else's doodle. I mean, I recall Kaworu being very relaxed and Shinji being nervous and avoidant. It's not like he's ever had shower with anyone else before, what with all the other Eva pilots being girls. Personally, I think Kaworu had a typical human male body, and if he did have core it would be smaller and probably internal. However, if something was abnormal about his body Shinji would've been to busy avoiding an awkward situation to notice.
